description: Box plots comparing the distribution of 2023 SPG scores across four locales — City, Suburb, Town, and Rural — showing each group's median, interquartile range, and outliers on a shared score axis.

title.subtitle: Box plots compare several distributions at once — median, spread, and outliers.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
